# PMS Hr Property

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This module extends the functionality of hr to support multiproperty in PMS.
Allow you to select workplaces/properties for the employee.
